title: DpaData
description:
DpaData
Object for Integrator to populate Digital Payment Application (DPA) information, including the Merchant name, address, and other relevant data.

dpaPresentationName.description:
The name of the Merchant that the Cardholder will see when checking out with the Digital Payment Application (DPA).

Conditional: Required for Guest Checkout Tokenization (GCT) and SQR programs.

dpaName.description: Legal name of Merchant (which may differ from dpaPresentationName).

dpaLogoUri.description: URI for the logo displayed to Cardholders during C2P checkout.

dpaUri.description: Digital Payment Application (DPA) identifier. This field may contain the DPA website URI, a mobile application identifier, or another unique identifier (UUID, URL, APK package name, etc.).
